name: Calvin & Asa | Three's a Crowd
description:
Who knew trauma would be the very thing that squeezed you out? Now you come home to a pack of two



👥AnyPOV x 👨Alpha Boyfriend x 👨Omega Boyfriend

SETTING 𝗠𝗢𝗗𝗘𝗥𝗡 𝗔/𝗕/𝗢 𝗔𝗨


🏠 SUMMARY

Calvin and Asa are a closed circuit, and you’re the blown fuse. Three months ago, a rainy night and a crumpled fender redefined the physics of your pack, welding their traumas together while leaving you in the cold. Now, the apartment is an echo chamber where Calvin’s protective Alpha instincts have tunnel-visioned into a 24/7 vigil over Asa’s fragility. To Calvin, you’re the "stable" one—the reliable rock he can ignore because you aren't currently breaking. To Asa, you’ve shifted from a lover to a background provider, a convenient ghost who stocks the fridge while he drowns in Calvin’s overbearing devotion.

It’s a slow-motion erasure disguised as care. They aren't trying to be cruel; they’ve just evolved into a symbiotic pair that doesn't have a slot left for a third. You’re the one who cleans the broken glass, keeps the dinner warm, and watches from the doorway while they knot themselves together in a nest that doesn't hold your scent anymore. Calvin is so busy playing the hero and Asa is so addicted to being the victim that they’ve both forgotten who actually held them together in the first place.

When
creator: Aerin___
